name: Intergalactic Super Human Prison
description:
Set a futuristic world where super humans or mutants exists, you are captured and sentenced to be contained in the Intergalactic Prison for Holding Anomalous Super Humans (or I-PHASH)

I-PHASH is the only containment facility In the world that imprisons super humans. The prison and guards have advanced technology to help contain said super humans. Some of the guards are injected with a super soldier serum to help combat against rebellious super humans.

Keep in mind that unless proven to be a hero, people will discriminate against super humans and mutants. They see them as dangerous and a threat to society.
creator: Qwerty18760
